untranslatable_reason: Flag pattern detection requires geometric analysis of parallel trend lines and consolidation zone identification. This cannot be expressed using only the allowed indicators (price, moving averages, RSI, ATR, Bollinger Bands, MACD, ADX, Stochastic, Donchian, Pivots, Volume, Returns, Bar Properties). The signal specifically requires identifying two parallel trend lines and measuring the duration/bounds of a consolidation pattern, which requires pattern recognition algorithms beyond the scope of simple indicator comparisons.
translation_notes: Attempted proxy using ADX_14 > 25 to detect strong trend context and SMA_50 crossovers to approximate breakout direction. However, this does not capture the core flag pattern mechanics: parallel trend line bounds, duration tracking (< 3 weeks), midpoint position in the move, or the distinction between horizontal vs sloped flags. A proper implementation would require custom pattern detection logic.
